title: Was Modern Computing Technology Reversed Engineered From UFO Crash?
summary: This interview excerpt discusses claims made by Army officer Philip J. Corso about reverse engineering technology from the Roswell UFO crash. It covers his alleged involvement in a covert government group and his assertions that modern technologies like fiber optics and integrated circuits originated from alien debris.

key_claims.claim: Philip J. Corso was on the staff of President Eisenhower's National Security Council for four years
Corso later became chief of the Pentagon's foreign technology desk in Army Research and Development
A covert government group was assembled under Admiral Roscoe H. Hillenkoetter to collect information on off-planet technology and retrieve debris from the Roswell crash
Corso claims he was part of the cleanup crew at Roswell
Reverse engineering of Roswell parts indirectly led to the development of fiber optics, lasers, integrated circuits, and Kevlar
